markets.rules_primary: If Tyler Stephenson records 3+ hits in the Cincinnati vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tyler Stephenson is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Stephenson starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Stephenson is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tyler Stephenson is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
